rationale: For an offline finance and accounting mobile app (React Native), data density, objective truth, and clarity are paramount. The Swiss & High-Contrast archetype ensures legibility of numbers, balances, and dates while maintaining a highly professional, modern aesthetic.

typography.fontFamily: Work Sans (Headings) and IBM Plex Sans (Body)
typography.alignment: Strictly left-aligned for data and lists. No center alignment for structural text.

dashboard_summary.layout: Bento-grid inspired. Large prominent Net Position card, followed by 2-column smaller metrics.
dashboard_summary.style: Flat cards, 1px solid #E4E4E7 border, no drop shadows. Background #F4F4F5.

credit_card_visual.background: Use image from image_urls with overlay, or solid #18181B with abstract shapes.
credit_card_visual.content: Bank name top left, remaining limit huge in the center, progress bar at the bottom.
credit_card_visual.progress_bar: Height 6px, track background rgba(255,255,255,0.2), fill indicator pure white (#FFFFFF).
credit_card_visual.warning_state: If statement date is near, highlight due date in #F59E0B.

list_items.right: Amount formatted dynamically (Red for debt, Green for asset, with ₺ symbol).

bottom_sheet.usage: For all Add/Edit actions (Add Payment, Add Company).
bottom_sheet.style: Border radius 24px on top corners, shadow for depth separation, #FFFFFF background.

inputs.style: Height 48px, border 1px solid #E4E4E7, radius 8px, padding 12px. Focus state gets border #0A0A0A.

image_urls.description: Dark abstract texture for credit card backgrounds.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text amounts have at least 4.5:1 ratio against their background.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all buttons, tab items, and list rows.
accessibility.test_ids: Apply testID (React Native equivalent of data-testid) to all interactive elements (e.g. testID='tab-ozet').

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop standard React Native Expo components using .js files.
Do NOT use HTML/Tailwind; translate the Swiss High-Contrast design principles into React Native StyleSheet objects.
Implement bottom tab navigation using @react-navigation/bottom-tabs and use Ionicons from @expo/vector-icons.
App must be in Turkish Lira (₺). Implement formatting util for currency.
Credit card usage should feature a prominent progress bar.
Data entry forms (modals) must use Bottom Sheets or standard RN Modals.
Store data via AsyncStorage or local SQLite since the app is fully offline.
Apply 'Swiss Brutalist' aesthetic: 1px flat borders, heavy font weights for headers, no soft drop shadows.
Make sure all components have testID prop.
